finalized_plan.description: Extract the items from the grocery list provided
Review the botanical definitions and classifications relevant to determining which items are vegetables (focusing on non-fruit plant parts)
Analyze each item and classify them: include items that are botanically vegetables and exclude items that are botanical fruits, herbs, grains, dairy, processed foods, or nuts
Identify that from the list only "sweet potatoes," "broccoli," "celery," and "lettuce" meet the criteria for vegetables
Alphabetize the final list of vegetables
Format the vegetables as a comma-separated list

root_cause_reasoning: The agent did not look up what the 'botanical definition' specifically means, but instead made the distinction based on its own knowledge.
